title: Stop Losing to Payment Solutions for Iranian Digital Sellers — Here Is the Real Fix
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling digital products from Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, Pakistan, or Bangladesh is possible with crypto-native infrastructure that has no geographic restrictions.

content.text:
Iranian digital sellers are losing thousands due to PayPal restrictions and banking limitations. 
  This problem exists because traditional payment solutions insist on Know-Your-Customer (KYC) checks, 
  forcing creators to choose between security and income. Iranian creators need a better solution – one 
  that's secure, instant, and open globally. They deserve to sell their digital products without 
  worrying about blocked payments and lost revenue. The time to break free from these restrictions 
  is now, and Unchained Commerce is here to help.
The Real Reason This Problem Exists

Iran is subject to international sanctions and restrictive regulations, making it difficult 
      for creators to use conventional payment solutions. PayPal, in particular, has a 
      well-documented history of restricting Iranian accounts without warning. This means that 
      creators must either give up their income or jump through hoops to prove their identity 
      and legitimacy. Unchained Commerce understands that this is not acceptable and is here to 
      provide a secure, instant, and open solution for Iranian digital sellers.
Why the Obvious Fixes Do Not Work

The obvious fixes, such as using alternative payment processors or creating a bank account 
      in a different country, are often not viable for Iranian creators. Many alternative 
      payment processors require KYC checks, which can be time-consuming and invasive. 
      Creating a bank account in a different country can be expensive and requires significant 
      documentation. Unchained Commerce's solution is not a temporary fix but a long-term 
      infrastructure that provides a secure and efficient way for Iranian creators to sell their 
      digital products.
The Infrastructure That Solves It

GitHub Pages provides free, reliable hosting for static sites with no server management required. A digital store built on GitHub Pages with the Core Shop Engine has no monthly hosting cost, scales automatically to any traffic level, and can be deployed from anywhere in the world. The combination of free hosting, crypto payments through NOWPayments, and automated delivery through the Core Shop Engine creates a store infrastructure with a total cost structure that is fundamentally different from platform-based alternatives. There are no percentage fees on sales, no monthly subscription costs, and no platform that can decide to delist your products based on content policy changes.

Unchained Commerce's blockchain-based solution is the key to unlocking new revenue streams 
    and growing your business.
How to Implement the Solution Today

Creators in Ethiopia, Cameroon, Tanzania, Venezuela, Iran, and the Philippines face a specific challenge: not only are conventional payment platforms unavailable or severely limited, but the local banking infrastructure may add additional friction to receiving international transfers even through alternative channels. Crypto payments remove this layer entirely. A seller in Addis Ababa and a seller in Amsterdam receive USDT transactions through the same infrastructure, at the same speed, with the same fees. The blockchain has no knowledge of which country a wallet is located in. This geographic neutrality is the core property that makes crypto-native infrastructure the right foundation for creators in restricted markets.
What Success Looks Like After the Fix

After implementing Unchained Commerce's solution, Iranian digital sellers can expect to 
      receive payments instantly and securely. They can sell their digital products globally, 
      without worrying about sanctions or restrictions. Unchained Commerce's solution is the 
      key to unlocking new revenue streams and growing your business. Join the thousands of 
      creators who have already made the switch to Unchained Commerce and start selling your 
      digital products today.
How can creators in Africa sell digital products internationally?

The most practical path for creators in restricted countries is a combination of NOWPayments for payment processing and USDT on Tron for the primary payment coin. USDT is a stable coin pegged to the US dollar, which means your revenue does not fluctuate with crypto market movements. Tron network fees are under one dollar, and settlement takes under 60 seconds. Once you receive USDT in your wallet, you convert to local currency through P2P exchanges — Binance P2P, Paxful, or local platforms specific to your country. The conversion typically takes 20-30 minutes and costs 2-5% of the transaction, which is significantly less than PayPal's international transfer fees or Western Union's rates. This is the complete payment flow that thousands of creators in Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, Pakistan, and Bangladesh are using right now.

Iranian digital sellers can receive payments instantly and securely using Unchained 
    Commerce's solution.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

If you're a digital seller in Nigeria, Ghana, or Kenya, you may be familiar with the 
  challenges of selling online. However, Unchained Commerce's solution is not just for African 
  creators – it's a global solution that can be used by digital sellers from all over the world. 
  Our Web3 Wallet Connect frontend allows buyers to pay in over 300 different cryptocurrencies, 
  making it the perfect solution for creators who want to sell their digital products globally. 
  Visit our shop at https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html to learn more.
Your Action Checklist

To start selling your digital products using Unchained Commerce's solution, follow these steps: 
  1. Visit our shop at https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html and purchase our 
  Web3 Wallet Connect frontend for $19.99. 2. Install the frontend on your website and configure 
  it to accept payments. 3. Start selling your digital products and watch as the payments roll 
  in. Unchained Commerce's solution is designed to be easy to use and requires minimal setup, 
  making it perfect for creators who are new to blockchain technology.

Our Web3 Wallet Connect frontend allows buyers to pay in over 300 different cryptocurrencies 
    and supports global sales.
